icons.name: home

icons.name: layers
icons.rationale: Stacked neomorphic tiles representing GIS data layers.

icons.name: analysis
icons.rationale: Magnifying glass with a crayon wiggle inside the lens.

icons.name: profile
icons.rationale: Squishy silhouette icon for user profiles.

icons.name: add
icons.rationale: Plump plus sign for adding new data layers.

icons.name: save
icons.rationale: Neomorphic cloud icon for saving map views.

icons.name: export
icons.rationale: Bouncy arrow icon for exporting spatial data.

icons.name: vessel
icons.rationale: Neomorphic cargo ship representing maritime logistics layers.

icons.name: farm
icons.rationale: Plump neomorphic barn representing agricultural and environmental layers.

icons.name: tree
icons.rationale: Plump neomorphic tree for environmental and parks layers.

icons.name: water
icons.rationale: Wavy neomorphic water icon for hydrology and infrastructure layers.

icons.name: road
icons.rationale: Perspective road icon for transport and infrastructure layers.

icons.name: power
icons.rationale: Lightning bolt tower for electrical infrastructure layers.

icons.name: school
icons.rationale: Plump schoolhouse for social and educational facilities.

icons.name: hospital
icons.rationale: Medical cross silhouette for health services and social layers.

icons.name: shop
icons.rationale: Shopping bag icon for retail and commercial land use.

icons.name: factory
